name: rspec-explorer
description: Run RSpec examples from the Test Explorer and gutter in VS Code/Cursor.

scripts.prepublish:verify: pnpm -s prepublish:check && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s lint && pnpm -s test && pnpm -s package
scripts.release:prod: pnpm -s release:prod:check && pnpm -s prepublish:verify && pnpm exec vsce publish
scripts.sample:setup: bash -lc "cd sample && if command -v asdf >/dev/null 2>&1; then asdf exec bundle install; else bundle install; fi"
scripts.sample:test: bash -lc "cd sample && if command -v asdf >/dev/null 2>&1; then asdf exec bundle exec rspec --tag ~intentional_failure; else bundle exec rspec --tag ~intentional_failure; fi"
scripts.sample:test:all: bash -lc "cd sample && if command -v asdf >/dev/null 2>&1; then asdf exec bundle exec rspec; else bundle exec rspec; fi"
